description: The Piserà 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a criminal organization based in Tropea, Calabria, Italy. Active since the 1980s, it is allied with the Mancuso 'ndrina and has been in a feud with the La Rosa 'ndrina since the 1990s. The clan has been involved in violence, including the killing of municipal councilor Pasquale Piserà in 1982.
